name: @rust/hash-graph-type-fetcher
description: RPC service definition to fetch external BP types

scripts.doc:dependency-diagram: cargo run -p hash-repo-chores -- dependency-diagram --output docs/dependency-diagram.mmd --root hash-graph-type-fetcher --root-deps-and-dependents --link-mode non-roots --include-dev-deps --include-build-deps --logging-console-level info
